100003: Database operation exception, please contact administrator to resolve
100004: Token signature exception, please login again later
100005: Invalid token, please login again later
100006: Token expired exception, please login again later
100007: Account not authenticated, please login again later
100008: Account not authorized, please contact administrator to get permission
101000: Phone or password error, please login again later
101001: Account disabled, please contact administrator to enable
102000: Role code already exists, cannot repeat create
102001: Role name already exists, cannot repeat create
102003: Role is used by user, cannot be deleted
